name: VeBetter Relayers
desc: The central hub for managing and monitoring VeBetterDAO auto-voting relayers.

name: Disperse
desc: Distribute VET or tokens to multiple addresses in a single transaction using multi-clause

name: Walkie
desc: Walk more, earn more! Simply take a photo of your daily step count displayed on your smartwatch screen and upload it to the Walkie dapp. Get rewarded with $B3TR for every verified movement you make.

name: Dappies
desc: Complete challenges across the VeBetter universe: shop sustainably with GreenCart, ditch single-use cups with Mugshot, clean up your neighbourhood with Cleanify and more; watch your Dappy evolve as you rack up verified, on-chain proof of your real-world impact.

name: Avoco
desc: Avoco is designed to encourage healthy, balanced eating while promoting eco-conscious habits through mindful food choices that reduce environmental impact.

name: The Shts
desc: The Shts is an exceptional collection of 1131 one-of-a-kind NFTs that brings together the creative forces of Smuzzies and DataB4Dishonor. This remarkable collaboration is further enhanced by its integration with the $SHT token, adding a unique dimension to the collection.

name: 1M PXL
desc: A Million decentralized pixels universe. Claim your place on-chain and support your favorite dapps.

name: NoPaper
desc: Shop and Earn!, Your groceries, now rewarding the planet.

name: WoV Marketplace
desc: The first gas-free, green NFT platform built on the VeChain blockchain
